title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.24 — three user notes. (1) EMERALD SWITCH darker + TRANSLUCENT: the cap is deep tinted plastic (alpha ~0.85-0.88) so the dark housing reads through it instead of a bright opaque green; specular/spill pulled back to match. (2) MODULE POWER CAPS are now DEEP WORN TRANSLUCENT PURPLE (was teal): dark violet tinted plastic, housing reading through, dulled face, purple spill. (3) LIMITER DRIVE GLOW: INPUT/LEVEL/LIMIT tiles burn brighter the harder that stage works. NEW proc.limiterInLevel atomic taps the level arriving AT the limiter (post glue/output-gain, pre limiter/clip — read-only, audio untouched); LEVEL reads outputTruePeakL; LIMIT reads limiterGR (6 dB reduction = full glow). ParamSlider gained setHeat() (same pattern as the AMBER tubes; quantised 1/20 so cached lamp faces are reused); LimiterPanel drives it at 30Hz, only while showing. VERIFY IN ABLETON: push the mix and watch LIMITER INPUT/LEVEL light up, and LIMIT burn as it clamps; emerald squares read deep translucent green not bright; module ON caps read worn purple. OPEN: painted-metal chassis fork; deferred patina surfaces (TWEAK/EQ/AgeLfo/license/logo/header buttons).
